rules_evaluated.name: Banned words — grep zero-tolerance
rules_evaluated.notes: No hits for: honest, delve, landscape-verb, importantly, crucial, substrate, leverage-verb, synergize, paradigm shift

rules_evaluated.name: Ritual / practice (as noun) / ceremony — hard ban
rules_evaluated.notes: No violations in body; maintainer-block instances exempt

rules_evaluated.name: No stale markers, no 'fixed' retrospectives, no session biography
rules_evaluated.notes: Line 8 Pass 1 skeleton date is frontmatter-equivalent exception per rule 3

rules_evaluated.name: Register match
rules_evaluated.notes: Business-audience supplementary; clean, peer-level register throughout

rules_evaluated.name: Rough-cut drafts for articles
rules_evaluated.notes: Not an article draft; structured reference material

rules_evaluated.name: Credit the original when paraphrasing
rules_evaluated.notes: Karpathy and Boris Cherny credited in maintainer block; no unattributed technique paraphrases

rules_evaluated.name: Always you, never the student; no teacher framing
rules_evaluated.notes: Reference material format appropriate; no teacher-framing or third-person student refs in body

rules_evaluated.name: Don't smuggle maintainer terms into body
rules_evaluated.notes: All technical terms (MCP, headless SaaS, semantic skill, CLI) earned with analogies in body before use

rules_evaluated.name: Over-hedge detector
rules_evaluated.notes: No reassurance-shaped sentences (no 'it's OK if', 'fine way to', etc.)

rules_evaluated.name: Verbatim-frame-cite in reference artefact
rules_evaluated.notes: Not a student-task reference artefact; practitioner patterns cited appropriately

rules_evaluated.name: Cap practitioner attribution at one per module
rules_evaluated.notes: Cross-cutting reference doc; multiple practitioners appropriate across sections

rules_evaluated.name: Punchy framing keeps its punch; carve-out lives downstream
rules_evaluated.notes: No punchy frames requiring carve-outs; architectural language is precise

rules_evaluated.name: Value-prop / positioning framing belongs in strategy, NOT student body
rules_evaluated.notes: Body teaches architecture (files, MCP, CLIs, etc.); practitioner observations are teaching principles, not positioning claims

rules_evaluated.name: Watch out for planting jargon too early
rules_evaluated.notes: All jargon earned with analogies: MCP (universal plug), CLI (text handle), headless SaaS (product is API). Module 2 context appropriate.

rules_evaluated.name: Audit closer when trimming forcing function
rules_evaluated.notes: Reference material; no procedural forcing functions

rules_evaluated.name: No combative verbs about the agent in body prose
